zh: 那个唱歌的女孩是我的同学。
en: The girl who is singing is my classmate.

zh: 我认识那个赢得比赛的男孩。
en: I know the boy who won the competition.

zh: 帮助了我的那个人是我的老师。
en: The person who helped me is my teacher.

zh: 住在我旁边的女人是一名医生。
en: The woman who lives next to me is a doctor.

zh: 我喜欢那些努力工作的人。
en: I like people who work hard.

zh: 我昨天买的那本书很有趣。
en: The book that I bought yesterday is very interesting.

zh: 她喜欢那只有黑白斑点的猫。
en: She likes the cat that has black and white spots.

zh: 我们住的那栋楼很旧了。
en: The building that we live in is very old.

zh: 他发明的机器改变了世界。
en: The machine that he invented changed the world.

zh: 这是我见过的最好的电影。
en: This is the best film that I have ever seen.

zh: 她住的那个城市很美丽。
en: The city where she lives is beautiful.

zh: 我出生的那个小镇很小。
en: The town where I was born is very small.

zh: 我们相遇的那天是个晴天。
en: The day when we met was sunny.

zh: 他离开的原因没有人知道。
en: The reason why he left is unknown.

zh: 这就是她哭泣的原因。
en: That is the reason why she was crying.

zh: 我有一个朋友，他住在上海。
en: I have a friend who lives in Shanghai.

zh: 她有一只猫，它非常可爱。
en: She has a cat which is very cute.

zh: 他写了一本书，已经卖出了很多册。
en: He wrote a book which has sold many copies.

zh: 我们参观了那座博物馆，它建于1900年。
en: We visited the museum, which was built in 1900.

zh: 她的父亲是一名医生，他非常忙碌。
en: Her father is a doctor, who is very busy.

zh: 我认识一个人，他的父亲是著名的科学家。
en: I know a person whose father is a famous scientist.

zh: 那个书包是红色的女孩是我的朋友。
en: The girl whose schoolbag is red is my friend.

zh: 他们住的那栋房子的屋顶是绿色的。
en: The house whose roof is green is where they live.

zh: 我认识一个名字很特别的人。
en: I know a person whose name is very special.

zh: 那个钱包被偷的男人去了警察局。
en: The man whose wallet was stolen went to the police station.

zh: 他是我见过的最聪明的人。
en: He is the most intelligent person that I have ever met.

zh: 这是我吃过的最好吃的食物。
en: This is the most delicious food that I have ever eaten.

zh: 她是第一个完成考试的学生。
en: She was the first student who finished the exam.

zh: 这是唯一能解决问题的方法。
en: This is the only way that can solve the problem.

zh: 他们谈论的那个话题很有趣。
en: The topic that they talked about was very interesting.
